title: PureCycle leads short interest in small-cap materials stocks through March
content:
[Trading charts background]
da-kuk

Rising geopolitical tensions are putting short interest in materials stocks back in the spotlight, highlighting investor caution around steel, chemicals, and metals firms exposed to trade and supply chain disruptions.

PureCycle Technologies (PCT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PCT]) leads short interest in the commodity chemicals industry at 26.12%, while Brazil Potash (GRO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GRO]) shows low short interest at 0.52% in fertilizers & agricultural chemicals.

At the same time, the State Street Materials Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XLB]) has climbed about 11% year to date, leading sector gains even as broader markets remain volatile.

HERE’S A LIST OF THE 5 MOST SHORTED SMALL-TO-MICRO-CAP MATERIALS STOCKS (AS A % OF SHARES OUTSTANDING):

 	* PureCycle Technologies (PCT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PCT]) – Commodity chemicals sector, short interest 26.12%, Quant rating 1.10 (Strong Sell)
 	* Ramaco Resources (METC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/METC]) – Steel sector, short interest 20.24%, Quant rating 1.60 (Sell)
 	* ASP Isotopes (ASPI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ASPI]) – Specialty chemicals sector, short interest 17.93%, Quant rating 1.39 (Strong Sell)
 	* United States Antimony (UAMY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/UAMY]) – Diversified metals & mining sector, short interest 17.44%, Quant rating 3.23 (Hold)
 	* American Battery Technology Company (ABAT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ABAT]) – Diversified metals & mining sector, short interest 16.20%, Quant rating 1.66 (Sell)

HERE’S A LIST OF THE 5 LEAST SHORTED SMALL-TO-MICRO-CAP MATERIALS STOCKS (AS A % OF SHARES OUTSTANDING):

 	* Brazil Potash (GRO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GRO]) – Fertilizers & agricultural chemicals sector, short interest 0.52%, Quant rating 3.31 (Hold)
 	* Victoria Gold (VITFF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VITFF]) – Gold sector, short interest 0.67%
 	* IT Tech Packaging (ITP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ITP]) – Paper products sector, short interest 0.76%
 	* Vista Gold (VGZ [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VGZ]) – Gold sector, short interest 0.87%, Quant rating 2.67 (Hold)
 	* Mesabi Trust (MSB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MSB]) – Steel sector, short interest 0.95%

Materials ETFs: (XLB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XLB]), (VAW [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VAW]), (IYM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IYM]), (FXZ [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FXZ]), (MXI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MXI]), (RSPM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RSPM])
